content: <1>Vectorization</1> — Documents are processed and indexed when you upload them to Knowledge Base in AI agents.

comment.text: This translation key provides tooltip text explaining the "Vectorization" process in AI agents. It describes how documents are processed and indexed upon upload to the Knowledge Base. This tooltip appears within the Pricing/Billing section of the AI service settings panel.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'indexάρονται' is a transliteration of the English word 'indexed' into Greek script, which is considered poor quality/incorrect translation in a professional UI. It should use the proper Greek term 'καταχωρούνται' or 'δημιουργούνται ευρετήρια'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Διανυσμοποίηση</1> — Τα έγγραφα επεξεργάζονται και καταχωρούνται όταν τα ανεβάζετε στη Βάση Γνώσεων στους AI agents.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits the specific destination 'Knowledge Base' (ナレッジベース), which is a key part of the process description.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>ベクトル化</1> — ドキュメントは、AIエージェントのナレッジベースにアップロードされる際に処理およびインデックス化されます。

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'Kaitības bāze' is a mistranslation. 'Kaitība' means 'harm' or 'damage' in Latvian. The correct term for 'Knowledge Base' is 'Zināšanu bāze'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Vektoralizācija</1> — Dokumenti tiek apstrādāti un indeksēti, kad jūs tos augšupielādējat Zināšanu bāzē AI agentos.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Vektorovania' is in the genitive case, which makes the sentence grammatically incorrect as a heading/title. It should be in the nominative case 'Vektorizácia' to match the English 'Vectorization'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Vektorizácia</1> — Dokumenty sú spracované a indexované pri nahrazení do Základnej znalosti v AI agentoch.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'processed' was translated as 'obračunajo', which means 'calculated' or 'invoiced' (used for billing/accounting). In the context of data/documents, 'processed' should be 'obdelajo'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Vektorisacija</1> — Dokumenti se obdelajo in indeksirajo, ko jih naložite v zbirko znanja v AI agentih.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'упружите' is an incorrect translation for 'upload'. In Serbian, 'упружите' means 'to exert/apply (force/effort)', whereas the correct term for uploading files is 'отпремите' or 'поставите'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Векторизација</1> — Документи се обрађују и индексирају када их отпремите у Базу знања у AI агентима.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'Bilgi Tabanı'na yapıldığında' is grammatically incorrect and semantically wrong. It translates to 'when it is done to the Knowledge Base', whereas the English 'when you upload them to Knowledge Base' implies the action of uploading documents.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Vektörleştirme</1> — Belgeler, yapay zeka ajanlarındaki Bilgi Tabanı'na yüklendiğinde işlenir ve dizinlenir.
